objectives.text: Oh, come in, come in! I could not help but overhear the tavernkeeper going on again - apparently the builder has gone missing mid-job and the tavern awning still needs patching. I feel terrible for both of them, honestly. I thought I might help by crafting a Worker-Where-Are-You Scroll - it would highlight the builder so we could find them in no time! Would you be able to gather the ingredients for me?

options.answer: Happy to help! What do you need?

result.text: Wonderful! I will need three Teleport Scrolls, six Glowstone Dust, and two sheets of Paper. A bit involved, but worth it to settle this whole business once and for all, I think!

options.answer: I will get those gathered up!
I think this is between them, I am staying out of it.

objectives.text: Excellent! I am working on the scroll now - these things take a little time to get right. Come check in with me when you are ready and I will have it finished!

options.answer: Take your time, I will check back soon!
I am back - is the scroll ready?

objectives.text: Ah, perfect timing! The scroll is done. Let me just... [holds up the scroll and closes their eyes] ...there! It is done. Your builder should have a subtle glow about them now - they will not even notice. Go find them and see what they are up to. I will be here when you get back!

options.answer: On it! I will report back.

objectives.text: Oh! Oh no. You found me. Please, please - you have to keep this quiet! I have been sneaking down to the warehouse basement between tasks. It is the only place in the entire colony where I can get five minutes of peace without someone nagging me about something. I KNOW about the tavernkeeper's awning, I have not forgotten, I promise. I just needed a moment to breathe. You understand, yes? Please give my thanks to the enchanter - they are very kind. But keep this between us, would you?

options.answer: Your secret is safe with me. Get some rest!
I completely understand. I will not say a word.

result.text: Bless you! I will get to the awning first thing tomorrow, I swear it. Now if you do not mind, I still have about ten minutes left in my nap. Thank you, truly.

options.answer: Sweet dreams. You have earned it!

objectives.text: Ha! Hiding in the warehouse basement! That is... honestly, I cannot even blame them. The tavernkeeper has been relentless this week. Well, we found them, and I am sure the awning will get sorted out eventually. Here - take these scrolls and your materials back. You did a good deed today, even if it was mostly for everyone's sanity!

options.answer: I think we have all needed a quiet corner at some point.
Let us hope the tavernkeeper does not find the basement.

result.text: Ha! Oh they will eventually. But that is a problem for another day. Take your reward - you have earned it. And thank you for keeping this between us!
